summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MyGenie Customer App Phase 2 takeaway flow implementation. All 12 test scenarios passed successfully, validating OrderModeSelector component, mandatory name+phone validation, landing page branching, mode switching, and Browse Menu gating functionality.
passed_tests: Landing /478 (no params) - dine-in default: NO mode selector, Call Waiter/Pay Bill shown, Browse Menu enabled
Walk-in dine-in /478?type=walkin&orderType=dinein - NO mode selector, Call Waiter/Pay Bill shown
Takeaway /478?type=walkin&orderType=takeaway - Takeaway/Delivery toggle with Takeaway active, mandatory fields, Browse Menu disabled until filled
Delivery /478?type=walkin&orderType=delivery - toggle with Delivery active, mandatory fields, Browse Menu disabled until filled
Mode switching: Takeaway to Delivery button click - successfully switches to Delivery active state
Form validation: Fill name+phone on takeaway - Browse Menu becomes enabled and clickable
Browse Menu navigation: After filling fields - navigates to password setup page (correct customer flow)
Table QR /478?tableId=3794&tableName=3&type=table - shows table badge, NO mode selector, Call Waiter/Pay Bill shown
Room QR /478?tableId=6182&tableName=e3&type=room - shows room badge, NO mode selector, Call Waiter/Pay Bill shown
Backend API health check - GET /api/ returns 200
Backend restaurant config - GET /api/config/478 returns 200 with correct data
All data-testids present and functional: order-mode-selector, order-mode-takeaway-btn, order-mode-delivery-btn, capture-phone-input, capture-name-input, landing-browse-menu-btn
